title: armeria langei
intro: Armeria langei, also known as Lange's sea thrift, is a flowering plant species within the Primulaceae family. It is native to the western United States, specifically in the coastal regions of California. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. As a herbal remedy, Armeria langei can be prepared in teas, infusions, and tinctures to help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory issues, while also providing potential health benefits such as immune system support and anti-aging properties.
